implementation_notes: Pure functions only — no fetch, no DOM, no timers.

computeCurrentStreak: 'today-with-zero does not break the streak' implemented by searching backward from end for the first day with contribution_count > 0, then counting consecutive positive days from there.
sliceLast90Days: always returns exactly 90 entries; pads missing leading days with zero-contribution entries; computes weekday for padded entries via UTC.
test_strategy: Direct invocation under Node by edge-case-testing derivers-tests.js.
